Package jline.api

Class CACHE

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.api.CACHE
  • public class CACHE
extends Object
    APIs for stochastic models of caches

    • Constructor Detail

      • CACHE

        public CACHE()

    • Method Detail

      • cache_gamma_lp

        public static CACHE.cacheGammaLpReturn cache_gamma_lp​(Matrix[] lambda,
                                                      Matrix[][] R)
        Computes access factors for the cache
        Parameters:
        lambda - - request arrival rates from users to items of individual lists
        R - - reachability graph of a list
        Returns:
        - access factors, number of users, items, and lists

      • cache_mva

        public static CACHE.cacheMVAReturn cache_mva​(Matrix gamma,
                                             Matrix m)
        Exact recursive solution of the caching model
        Parameters:
        gamma - - access factors for item i to access list j
        m - - cache capacity vector
        Returns:
        - cache state probabilities at equilibrium Reference: Giuliano Casale, Nicolas Gast. Performance analysis methods for list-based caches with non-uniform access. IEEE/ACM Transactions on Networking, 2020, pp.1-18, for details.

      • cache_ttl_lrum

        public static Matrix cache_ttl_lrum​(Matrix[] gamma,
                                    Matrix m)

      • cache_ttl_hlru

        public static Matrix cache_ttl_hlru​(Matrix[] gamma,
                                    Matrix m)

      • cache_ttl_tree

        public static Matrix cache_ttl_tree​(Matrix[] lambda,
                                    Matrix[][] R,
                                    Matrix m)

      • cache_prob_asy

        public static Matrix cache_prob_asy​(Matrix gamma,
                                    Matrix m)
        Estimate asymptotic values of the cache state probabilities at equilibrium
        Parameters:
        gamma - - cache access factors
        m - - cache capacity vector
        Returns:
        - cache state probabilities at equilibrium

      • cache_xi_fp

        public static CACHE.cacheXiFpReturn cache_xi_fp​(Matrix gamma,
                                                Matrix m,
                                                Matrix xi)
        Estimate cache xi terms using a fixed-point algorithm. The xi terms are duals of the throughput of a queueing network but in the caching setting.
        Parameters:
        gamma - - cache access factors
        m - - cache capacity vector
        xi - - optional initial value of the fixed point iteration
        Returns:
        - cache xi terms
